channel.title: Preventative
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Preventative, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: This Ballad Hospital, Flooded by Hurricane Helene, Will Be Rebuilt for $44M in a Flood Plain
item.description: Ballad Health, the nation’s largest state-sanctioned hospital monopoly, plans to rebuild Unicoi County Hospital on land that two climate modeling comp...

item.title: Understanding Ultraprocessed Foods
item.description: It’s hard to escape ultraprocessed foods these days. A whopping 70% of our food supply is ultra-processed in the U.S. And unfortunately, quantity does...

item.title: Does Chiropractic Work for Chronic Pain?

item.title: Public Health Workers Are Quitting Over Assignments to Guantánamo

item.title: Carta Healthcare – AI for Registry Creation
item.description: It’s not well known but there’s a lot of people in hospitals who spend a lot of time creating patient registries for quality programs, CMS reporting, ...

item.title: This Many Steps A Day Significantly Reduces Cancer Risk
item.description: Plus, 4 ways to up your step count

item.title: Hypochlorous Acid Spray Is A Great Post-Workout Hack, Says A Derm
item.description: Sometimes you just won't have time to wash your face directly after a workout.

item.title: How To Mediate Sibling Conflicts, According To A Family Therapist
item.description: A therapist and mom of three explains how to navigate sibling conflicts and the technique that create a culture of respectful disagreement.

item.title: Watch: Is MAHA the New MAGA?

item.title: Experts Agree: This Is The Healthiest Way To Take Your Coffee
item.description: It'll benefit your gut health, brain function, and more.

item.title: I'm A Complete Mess If I Don't Sleep — This Supplement Gives Me My Deepest Rest*
item.description: It's worked wonders for my sleep and energy levels.*

item.title: Journalists Describe Drivers of High Health Costs and Spell Out the Science of Protein
item.description: KFF Health News journalists made the rounds on national and local media recently to discuss topical stories. Here’s a collection of their appearances.

item.title: Newsom Tries To Thread Needle on Immigrant Health as Ambitions Turn National
